_comment: Copy to hd_rerender.config.json and edit. comfy_root must be the directory containing main.py and the input/, output/, models/ subfolders. model is the filename of a .pth in models/upscale_models/ - if set, it overrides --quality entirely, for every tier. Omit it to use --quality's default (SPAN for low/med/high currently; see QUALITY_MODELS in hd_rerender.py). upscale_model is a legacy alias for model, kept for configs written before quality tiers existed. custom_model is different: it's only used when --quality custom is passed explicitly, so low/med/high keep their normal meaning even if you have a custom_model set for occasional use. dontrescale_model overrides the fixed same-resolution (1x) restoration model used for character customization/diffuse imagery (face/head/eye/freckle/pattern - see DONTRESCALE_CONTAINS in categorize.py); it's entirely independent of --quality/model/custom_model and defaults to DONTRESCALE_MODEL in hd_rerender.py if omitted.
